title: helichrysum panduratum var. panduratum
intro: Helichrysum panduratum var. panduratum, also known as the "Mountain Everlasting", is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the high-altitude mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Helichrysum panduratum var. panduratum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
